place: Retreat via Rheine into the Lüneburg Heath
description: After the English crossed the Rhine at Wesel, the division is abruptly pulled out of Holland. March via Rheine eastward, heavy equipment blown up in the Lüneburg Heath.
Retreat as far as Lenzen. Along the way meets the residents of Daber, who had been evacuated there. The unit is reconstituted as an artillery battery with 10.5 cm howitzers.
Sent marching toward Berlin and deployed at Fehrbellin against the Russians pushing toward Berlin. April passes with various engagements.

Hitler's death announced. V-2 leadership has reached an agreement with the Americans. Wilhelm promoted to Unteroffizier. The Americans are only looking for specialists. At 8 PM, handover to the Russians — so swims across the Elbe on truck inner tubes at 8°C.
By truck westward via Herford, 3 days and nights without roof or food on a sports field. Then loaded onto open freight cars, continuing toward Belgium.

Slips away at the Krefeld suburban station with Kurt Günther and Gert Schrade. A little boy takes them along to his mother, who outfits them with work clothes. Night across country, then an estate with an opulent breakfast.
Through the innkeepers' mediation, and with money from the battery cash box, gets hold of a boat; crosses the Rhine at Wittlaer unmolested.
From Hagen to Haspe by train. Big trouble at the ticket counter because of the foreign workers — mastered thanks to Schrade's English and French.

place: Trek through Sauerland / Westerwald / Vogelsberg / Rhön
description: 3-week hike with a small KAF atlas and compass along ridge trails. Overnight in barns, food begged for. Friendliness diminishes the further east they go.
Crosses the Werra with difficulty. The GI on the stone bridge is just busy with a German soldier in full uniform, so the three slip past unnoticed.
Schrade splits off and goes to his uncle in Gotha. Wilhelm and Kurt Günther take the Autobahn as far as Chemnitz.
Stopped by a GI near Borna at the American/Russian demarcation line, talk their way out of it. Reach the Russian side via the railway bridge. On 05/28 in Röhrsdorf at the wife of comrade Birka.
Around 8 PM rings the bell at Stiftstr. 39. Helga still remembers: Papa had very dirty feet. Return after 6 years to civilian and family life.
